risk_note.tr: Adimlar Microsoft Learn 'MBR2GPT' (4 Haz 2025 guncel) belgesinden alinmistir. Microsoft alintisi: 'MBR2GPT.EXE converts a disk from MBR to GPT without modifying or deleting data on the disk.' Veri guvenli ama firmware UEFI mode'a alinmazsa sistem acilmaz. Once tam yedek alin.
risk_note.en: Steps sourced from Microsoft Learn 'MBR2GPT' (updated 2025-06-04). Microsoft quote: 'MBR2GPT.EXE converts a disk from MBR to GPT without modifying or deleting data on the disk.' Data is safe, but if firmware not switched to UEFI mode, system won't boot. Take a full backup first.

prerequisites.tr: UEFI destekli sistem (Microsoft sarti: 'Make sure the device supports UEFI before attempting to convert')
prerequisites.en: UEFI-capable system (Microsoft requirement: 'Make sure the device supports UEFI before attempting to convert')

title.tr: Microsoft'un belirttigi disk on kosullari (validation bunlari kontrol eder)

body.tr: 1) Disk MBR olmali. 2) Diskin basinda 16 KB + 2 sektor, sonunda 16 KB + 1 sektor bos olmali (GPT metadata icin). 3) En fazla 3 primary partition. 4) Bir partition aktif ve system partition olarak isaretli. 5) Extended/logical partition olmamali. 6) BCD store'da OS partition'a pointer iceren default OS entry olmali.
body.en: 1) Disk must currently use MBR. 2) Free space: 16 KB + 2 sectors at front, 16 KB + 1 sector at end of disk (for GPT metadata). 3) At most three primary partitions. 4) One partition active and marked as system. 5) No extended/logical partitions. 6) BCD store must contain a default OS entry pointing to OS partition.

body.tr: 'By default, MBR2GPT.exe can only run from Windows PE and is blocked from running in full Windows. This option overrides this block and enables disk conversion while running in the full Windows environment. Since the existing MBR system partition is in use while running the full Windows environment, it can't be reused. In this case, a new EFI system partition is created by shrinking the OS partition.'
body.en: 'By default, MBR2GPT.exe can only run from Windows PE and is blocked from running in full Windows. This option overrides this block and enables disk conversion while running in the full Windows environment. Since the existing MBR system partition is in use while running the full Windows environment, it can't be reused. In this case, a new EFI system partition is created by shrinking the OS partition.'

title.tr: ZORUNLU: Firmware'i UEFI mode'a al (Microsoft 'Important' notu)
title.en: MANDATORY: Switch firmware to UEFI mode (Microsoft 'Important' note)

body.tr: Microsoft alintisi: 'After the disk has been converted to GPT partition style, the firmware must be reconfigured to boot in UEFI mode.' BIOS/UEFI'ye gir, Boot Mode veya CSM ayarini UEFI yap, Legacy/CSM kapali, kaydet, cik.
body.en: Microsoft quote: 'After the disk has been converted to GPT partition style, the firmware must be reconfigured to boot in UEFI mode.' Enter BIOS/UEFI, set Boot Mode or CSM to UEFI, disable Legacy/CSM, save, exit.

body.tr: 0 basari. 1 kullanici iptal. 2 ic hata. 3 init hatasi. 4 hatali parametre. 5 disk layout okuma hatasi. 6 sifreli volume. 7 disk layout gereksinim karsilamiyor. 8 EFI partition olusturma hatasi. 9 boot dosyasi yukleme hatasi. 10 GPT layout uygulama hatasi. 100 donusum oldu ama bazi BCD entry'leri geri yuklenemedi.
body.en: 0 success. 1 user canceled. 2 internal error. 3 init error. 4 bad command-line params. 5 disk read error. 6 encrypted volume. 7 disk layout doesn't meet requirements. 8 EFI partition creation error. 9 boot file install error. 10 GPT layout apply error. 100 conversion ok but some BCD entries could not be restored.

body.tr: %windir% altinda 4 log: diagerr.xml, diagwrn.xml, setupact.log, setuperr.log. setupact.log en detayli bilgileri icerir.
body.en: 4 logs under %windir%: diagerr.xml, diagwrn.xml, setupact.log, setuperr.log. setupact.log has the most detail.
